initiatives.name: Arkansas Community Advocates
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective building mutual aid networks and community power across Arkansas. They coordinate direct support, resource sharing, and solidarity initiatives while advocating for social justice and community care.

initiatives.name: Arkansas Justice Reform Coalition
initiatives.description: A statewide organization fostering mutual aid and community support while working towards criminal justice reform. They coordinate advocacy initiatives, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and systemic change.

initiatives.name: Taste of Olamhaba
initiatives.description: A community initiative fostering mutual aid and cultural solidarity through food justice and community support across Arkansas. They coordinate food distribution, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community care and cultural preservation.

initiatives.name: Arkansas Community Organization
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization building mutual aid networks and community power across Arkansas. They coordinate direct support, advocacy initiatives, and solidarity networks while working for social and economic justice through community organizing and collective action.

initiatives.name: Arkansas Disability Coalition
initiatives.description: A statewide organization fostering mutual aid and community support for families and individuals with disabilities across Arkansas. They coordinate resource sharing, healthcare navigation assistance, and solidarity networks while building power through disability justice organizing, family support, and creating inclusive spaces for people with disabilities to thrive.

initiatives.name: Arkansas Abortion Support Network
initiatives.description: A mutual aid network providing direct support, resources, and solidarity to ensure reproductive healthcare access. They coordinate practical support, funding assistance, and community care while building power through reproductive justice organizing.

initiatives.name: Arkansas RAPPS
initiatives.description: A statewide organization fostering mutual aid and community care through HIV prevention and healthcare access. They coordinate direct support, healthcare navigation, and solidarity networks while building power through health justice organizing and creating accessible pathways to PrEP and HIV care services.

initiatives.name: Intransitive
initiatives.description: A trans-led organization fostering mutual aid and community support for transgender and gender non-conforming people across Arkansas. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through trans justice organizing and community care.

initiatives.name: Queer Collective AR
initiatives.description: A grassroots mutual aid network providing support and solidarity for LGBTQ+ communities across Arkansas. They coordinate direct assistance, resource distribution, and community care initiatives while building power through queer liberation organizing and collective action.

initiatives.name: Arkansas Legal Aid
initiatives.description: A non-profit organization providing free legal services to low-income Arkansans. They offer legal assistance in civil matters including housing, family law, consumer protection, and public benefits, while working to ensure equal access to justice through advocacy and community education.

initiatives.name: DecARcerate
initiatives.description: Working to affirm human dignity by confronting unjust systems.
